framework.name: MCP (Model Context Protocol) - Client-Server Tool Integration
framework.description: Anthropic's protocol for connecting a single AI model to external tools, services, and data sources using a standardized client-server model. Uses HTTP, SSE, or local I/O streams to enable AI agents to access tools like Google Calendar, Slack, or file systems without custom API integrations.
framework.raw_quote: MCP is about connecting a single AI model to external tools, services, and data. MCP is the belt, giving it access to things like your Google calendar, Slack, Workspace, or even files on your laptop.
